title: batatas incurva
intro: Batatas incurva is a type of plant species, also known as the curved yam or yam of the forest, native to tropical Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which are believed to aid in the treatment of various health issues such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Batatas incurva include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant are often made by boiling the roots in water or using them in combination with other herbs to create teas, infusions, and tinctures for medicinal purposes.
